content.mi:
Te Haerenga ki Whakaari

I tētahi rā raumati, ka whakarite te iwi ki te haere ki Whakaari, te motu o ngā pari auahi me ngā tītī e whakatipu ana.

Ka utaia ā rātou waka ki te kai me te wai utu nui, ā, ka tono rātou i a Te Tahi kia haere tahi — hei ārahi i ngā karakia kia nui ai te hauhake.

Ka whakapono ia ki a rātou,

ā, ka whakaae.
content.en:
The Journey to Whakaari

One summer day, the iwi prepared to travel to Whakaari, the island of steaming cliffs and nesting tītī.

They loaded their waka with kai and precious water, and then they invited Te Tahi to join them—to lead the karakia for a plentiful harvest.

Trusting them,

he accepted.
